data.name: 菈菲卡與封印之楔
data.detailed_description:
▌故事大綱

由聖女統治的聖都「菈菲卡」，

為了繼承父親遺志而當上騎士的主角，由於一次任務而陷入困境。

藉由魔法之力逃出生天的主角，被信仰舊女神的教會所拯救，

在那裡得知真相之後，下定決心要打倒聖女。

這是被聖女設計陷害的主角，為了挽回名譽並找出真相而奮鬥不懈的故事……

▌遊戲內容

▪︎ 基本資訊

包含戰鬥的地城探索型RPG。

H場面：90種以上

基本CG：56張（含1張非HCG、不含H立繪）+差分

ED數：5種（含2種非H結局）

▪︎ 遊戲系統

－H場面有嬌喘配音

－有回想房間（通關後可全部解鎖）

－包含淫亂度與露出系統

－可跳過事件

－有色色狀態值

－有輕鬆模式（降低戰鬥難度）

※可處女通關

▌H情景

觸手、史萊姆、獸人、食人魔、人類等等，

在地城中以戰鬥、敗北與陷阱事件為主。

▌角色介紹

【瑟蕾莉亞】（名字可變更）

CV 浅木式様

本故事的主角。

在復興沒落家族的過程中，由於聖女的陰謀而陷入危機之中……

【修女】

CV 分倍河原シホ様

拯救並收留主角的心地善良的修女。

現在信仰著異教的女神。

data.short_description: 被聖女陷害的瑟蕾莉亞，為了挽回家族的名譽和真相，決意踏上復仇之路。在揭開陰謀的過程中，她將面對敵人的羞辱與無情的騷擾…… 身處肉慾的漩渦中，瑟蕾莉亞能否堅守信念，成功擊敗聖女呢?!
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)

data.name: Rafica and Sealing Wedge
data.detailed_description:
▌Summary

In the Sacred Capital of “Rafica”, ruled by the Saint,
To honor her father’s legacy, she became a knight —only to walk straight into a trap.
Using forbidden magic, the protagonist narrowly escapes death— only to be saved by a church that worships an old goddess.
There, she uncovers the truth... and swears to bring down the Saint.
Framed and betrayed, this is her relentless fight to reclaim her name and expose the lies behind the holy throne...

 

▌Game Overview

▪︎ Basic Info
An RPG featuring dungeon exploration and strategic combat.
H-scenes: 90+ 
Base CGs: 56 (includes 1 non-H CG, not including H character portrait) + variations 
Endings: 5 (includes 2 non-H endings)

▪︎ Game Features
– H-scenes feature moaning voice acting 
– Memory room (unlocked fully after clearing the game) 
– Includes lewdness & exhibition system 
– Events can be skipped 
– Features erotic status effects 
– Easy mode available (reduced battle difficulty) 
※ Virgin clearance is possible

 

▌Character Introduction

 

【Seleria】(Name can be changed)
CV 浅木式様

The protagonist of the story.
In her quest to revive her fallen family, she falls victim to the Saint’s schemes...

【Nun】
CV 分倍河原シホ様

A kind-hearted nun who saves and shelters the protagonist.
Now follows the teachings of an ancient goddess.

data.short_description: Framed by the Saint, knightess Seleria seeks truth and revenge to restore her family’s honor. But as dark plots unfold, she’s haunted, humiliated, and pushed to the edge. Trapped in a spiral of lust and control—can she stay true to herself and take the Saint down?
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
